meaning: adj.新奇的,不熟悉的,没有经验的
examples: My horse shied at the unfamiliar noise.
She felt uneasy in the unfamiliar surroundings.
Please highlight any terms that are unfamiliar to you.
It was unsettling being in an unfamiliar place, with unfamiliar weather, at the mercy of strangers.
For those unfamiliar with the Canadian actor-turned-music sensation that is Drake, let me fill you in.
